sec.title: 1. Definitions
sec.p: In this Agreement, “Services” means the services described in Schedule A. “Confidential Information” means any non-public information disclosed by one party to the other.

sec.title: 2.1 Term
sec.p: This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues for twelve (12) months unless terminated earlier in accordance with this Article.

sec.title: 2.2 Termination for Cause
sec.p: Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days written notice if the other party materially breaches any provision and fails to cure such breach within the notice period.

sec.title: 3. Governing Law
sec.p: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Japan, without regard to its conflict-of-laws principles.
